plugins.label: P25 (OP25/DSD)
plugins.command: if command -v op25_rx.py >/dev/null; then op25_rx.py --freq {freq_hz}; elif command -v rx.py >/dev/null; then rx.py --args 'rtl' -f {freq_hz}; elif command -v dsd >/dev/null && command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | dsd -i -; else echo 'missing P25 decoder (op25 or dsd)'; fi

plugins.label: Radiosonde RS41
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_433 >/dev/null; then rtl_433 -f {freq_mhz}M -M level -R 149; else echo 'missing rtl_433 for RS41'; fi

plugins.label: APRS / AX.25
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null && command -v direwolf >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | direwolf -q d -r 48000 -t 0 -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm or direwolf'; fi

plugins.label: Weather Satellite APT
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null && command -v satdump >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M wbfm -s 60000 -g 30 -E deemp - | satdump live noaa_apt /tmp/wirelessexplorer_noaa -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm or satdump'; fi

plugins.label: AM Demod (gqrx-style)
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M am -s 48000 -g 25 -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm'; fi

plugins.label: NFM Demod (gqrx-style)
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 30 -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm'; fi

plugins.label: Broadcast FM (gqrx-style)
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M wbfm -s 200000 -g 20 -E deemp -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm'; fi

plugins.label: SSB USB (gqrx-style)
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_sdr >/dev/null && command -v csdr >/dev/null; then rtl_sdr -f {freq_hz} -s 240000 - | csdr convert_u8_f | csdr shift_addition_cc 0.12 | csdr bandpass_fir_fft_cc 0.01 0.20 0.02 | csdr realpart_cf; else echo 'missing rtl_sdr or csdr for USB'; fi

plugins.label: SSB LSB (gqrx-style)
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_sdr >/dev/null && command -v csdr >/dev/null; then rtl_sdr -f {freq_hz} -s 240000 - | csdr convert_u8_f | csdr shift_addition_cc -0.12 | csdr bandpass_fir_fft_cc -0.20 -0.01 0.02 | csdr realpart_cf; else echo 'missing rtl_sdr or csdr for LSB'; fi

plugins.label: CW (gqrx-style)
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M am -s 12000 -g 20 -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm for CW monitor'; fi

plugins.label: DAB
plugins.command: if command -v welle-cli >/dev/null; then welle-cli -f {freq_mhz} -c 0; else echo 'missing welle-cli for DAB'; fi

plugins.label: Digital Voice DMR
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null && command -v dsd-fme >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | dsd-fme -fr -i -; elif command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null && command -v dsd >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | dsd -fr -i -; else echo 'missing dsd-fme/dsd for DMR'; fi

plugins.label: Digital Voice dPMR
plugins.command: if command -v dsd-fme >/dev/null && command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | dsd-fme -fd -i -; else echo 'missing dsd-fme for dPMR'; fi

plugins.label: Digital Voice D-Star
plugins.command: if command -v dsd-fme >/dev/null && command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | dsd-fme -fi -i -; elif command -v dsd >/dev/null && command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | dsd -fi -i -; else echo 'missing dsd-fme/dsd for D-Star'; fi

plugins.label: FreeDV
plugins.command: if command -v freedv_rx >/dev/null; then freedv_rx 700D /dev/stdin; else echo 'missing freedv_rx'; fi

plugins.label: DVB-S
plugins.command: if command -v leandvb >/dev/null; then leandvb --standard DVB-S --samplerate {sample_rate_hz}; else echo 'missing leandvb for DVB-S'; fi

plugins.label: DVB-S2
plugins.command: if command -v leandvb >/dev/null; then leandvb --standard DVB-S2 --samplerate {sample_rate_hz}; else echo 'missing leandvb for DVB-S2'; fi

plugins.label: NTSC Analog Video
plugins.command: if command -v tvheadend >/dev/null; then echo 'NTSC decode chain available via external TV stack'; else echo 'install tvheadend/related tools for NTSC chain'; fi

plugins.label: PAL Analog Video
plugins.command: if command -v tvheadend >/dev/null; then echo 'PAL decode chain available via external TV stack'; else echo 'install tvheadend/related tools for PAL chain'; fi

plugins.label: VOR
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M am -s 12000 -g 20 -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm for VOR monitor'; fi

plugins.label: LoRa
plugins.command: if command -v lora_receive_file >/dev/null; then lora_receive_file; else echo 'missing gr-lora binaries'; fi

plugins.label: Meshtastic Metadata
plugins.command: if command -v meshtastic >/dev/null; then meshtastic --info; elif command -v meshtasticd >/dev/null; then meshtasticd --version; else echo 'missing meshtastic CLI/daemon'; fi

plugins.label: Meshcore Metadata
plugins.command: if command -v meshcore >/dev/null; then meshcore --version; elif command -v meshcore-cli >/dev/null; then meshcore-cli --version; else echo 'missing meshcore tooling'; fi

plugins.label: M17
plugins.command: if command -v m17-demod >/dev/null; then m17-demod; else echo 'missing m17-demod'; fi

plugins.label: Packet AX.25
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null && command -v direwolf >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 48000 -g 35 - | direwolf -q d -r 48000 -t 0 -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm or direwolf for AX.25'; fi

plugins.label: Pager FLEX
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_fm >/dev/null && command -v multimon-ng >/dev/null; then rtl_fm -f {freq_hz} -M fm -s 22050 -g 35 - | multimon-ng -t raw -a FLEX -; else echo 'missing rtl_fm or multimon-ng for FLEX'; fi

plugins.label: Time Signal MSF
plugins.command: if command -v multimon-ng >/dev/null; then multimon-ng -a EAS -t raw -; else echo 'missing multimon-ng for MSF'; fi

plugins.label: Time Signal DCF77
plugins.command: if command -v multimon-ng >/dev/null; then multimon-ng -a DCF77 -t raw -; else echo 'missing multimon-ng for DCF77'; fi

plugins.label: Time Signal TDF
plugins.command: if command -v multimon-ng >/dev/null; then multimon-ng -a HAPN4800 -t raw -; else echo 'missing multimon-ng for TDF monitor'; fi

plugins.label: Time Signal WWVB
plugins.command: if command -v multimon-ng >/dev/null; then multimon-ng -a EAS -t raw -; else echo 'missing multimon-ng for WWVB monitor'; fi

plugins.label: Inmarsat Aero/L-band
plugins.command: if command -v jaero >/dev/null; then jaero; else echo 'missing jaero for Inmarsat Aero'; fi

plugins.label: TETRA Metadata
plugins.command: if command -v tetra-rx >/dev/null; then tetra-rx; elif command -v osmo-tetra >/dev/null; then osmo-tetra; else echo 'missing tetra-rx/osmo-tetra'; fi

plugins.label: Satcom Generic (non-encrypted)
plugins.command: if command -v satdump >/dev/null; then satdump list; else echo 'install satdump for additional satcom decode workflows'; fi

plugins.label: Iridium Toolkit Bundle
plugins.command: if command -v iridium-extractor >/dev/null; then iridium-extractor; else echo 'missing iridium-extractor (iridium-toolkit)'; fi

plugins.label: ACARS / VDL2
plugins.command: if command -v dumpvdl2 >/dev/null; then dumpvdl2 --rtlsdr 0 --frequency {freq_hz}; elif command -v acarsdec >/dev/null; then acarsdec -A -N -f {freq_hz}; else echo 'missing dumpvdl2/acarsdec'; fi

plugins.label: ADS-B UAT 978
plugins.command: if command -v dump978-fa >/dev/null; then dump978-fa; elif command -v dump978 >/dev/null; then dump978; else echo 'missing dump978'; fi

plugins.label: AIS / Maritime
plugins.command: if command -v rtl_ais >/dev/null; then rtl_ais; else echo 'missing rtl_ais'; fi

plugins.label: Drone: DJI DroneID / RID
plugins.command: if command -v droneid_receiver >/dev/null; then droneid_receiver --freq {freq_hz}; elif command -v droneid_decode >/dev/null; then droneid_decode --freq {freq_hz}; else echo 'missing DJI DroneID decoder (droneid_receiver/droneid_decode)'; fi

plugins.label: Drone: OpenDroneID (Wi-Fi/BLE RID)
plugins.command: if command -v opendroneid_rx >/dev/null; then opendroneid_rx --freq {freq_hz}; elif command -v opendroneid-decode >/dev/null; then opendroneid-decode --freq {freq_hz}; elif command -v odid-decode >/dev/null; then odid-decode --freq {freq_hz}; else echo 'missing OpenDroneID decoder (opendroneid_rx/opendroneid-decode/odid-decode)'; fi

plugins.label: Drone: Parrot Telemetry/RID
plugins.command: if command -v opendroneid_rx >/dev/null; then opendroneid_rx --freq {freq_hz}; elif command -v droneid_receiver >/dev/null; then droneid_receiver --freq {freq_hz}; else echo 'missing Parrot telemetry/RID decoder tooling'; fi

plugins.label: Inmarsat STD-C
plugins.command: if command -v stdc_decoder >/dev/null; then stdc_decoder --freq {freq_hz}; elif command -v stdcdec >/dev/null; then stdcdec --freq {freq_hz}; elif command -v inmarsatc-decoder >/dev/null; then inmarsatc-decoder --freq {freq_hz}; else echo 'missing STD-C decoder (stdc_decoder/stdcdec/inmarsatc-decoder)'; fi

plugins.label: GSM Control Channel Metadata
plugins.command: if command -v grgsm_livemon_headless >/dev/null; then grgsm_livemon_headless; elif command -v cell_search >/dev/null; then cell_search -g 50; else echo 'missing gr-gsm tools'; fi

plugins.label: LTE Cell Metadata
plugins.command: if command -v srsue >/dev/null; then srsue --version; elif command -v lte-cell-scanner >/dev/null; then lte-cell-scanner; else echo 'missing LTE metadata scanner tools'; fi
